changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Analyzer-provided reference range and abnormal flag (ASTM R.6/R.7, HL7 OBX-7/OBX-8 via bridge FHIR Observation.referenceRange/.interpretation) carried into analyzer staging as preserved analyzer evidence (LIS-97). Null = source carried none. Distinct from the lab-owned result_limits range applied at accept (LIS-188/LIS-191), which these columns never feed.

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Carry the analyzer-provided reference range and abnormal flag onto the clinical result at technician acceptance, beside the LIS-7 raw/normalized provenance columns (LIS-97). Write-once analyzer evidence set at accept — deliberately NOT added to the result_version snapshot columns or the append_result_version trigger (047): the staging row remains the raw audit source, and these never change after accept.

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Widen analyzer range/flag evidence to unbounded text without rewriting the already-published lis97-001/lis97-002 checksums. The current result row is the supported display/FHIR source: analyzer acceptance replaces evidence with the selected value's pair, while a manual value change clears it so stale evidence is never exported.

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Add analyzer range/flag to each immutable result_version snapshot so every value version retains the evidence that was current with that value (LIS-97).

changeSet.author: labsolution
changeSet.comment: Replace append_result_version so analyzer range/flag changes create and populate an immutable value/evidence snapshot (LIS-97).
changeSet.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION clinlims.append_result_version() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $BODY$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' AND OLD.value IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.value AND OLD.raw_code IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.raw_code AND OLD.raw_unit IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.raw_unit AND OLD.loinc IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.loinc AND OLD.ucum_value IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.ucum_value AND OLD.status IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.status AND OLD.reference_range IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.reference_range AND OLD.abnormal_flag IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.abnormal_flag) THEN RETURN NULL; END IF;
INSERT INTO clinlims.result_version (result_id, version_number, value, raw_code, raw_unit, loinc, ucum_value, status, reference_range, abnormal_flag) VALUES (NEW.id, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(rv.version_number), 0) + 1 FROM clinlims.result_version rv WHERE rv.result_id = NEW.id), NEW.value, NEW.raw_code, NEW.raw_unit, NEW.loinc, NEW.ucum_value, NEW.status, NEW.reference_range, NEW.abnormal_flag); RETURN NULL; END; $BODY$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;

rollback.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION clinlims.append_result_version() RETURNS TRIGGER AS $BODY$ BEGIN IF (TG_OP = 'UPDATE' AND OLD.value IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.value AND OLD.raw_code IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.raw_code AND OLD.raw_unit IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.raw_unit AND OLD.loinc IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.loinc AND OLD.ucum_value IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.ucum_value AND OLD.status IS NOT DISTINCT FROM NEW.status) THEN RETURN NULL; END IF;
INSERT INTO clinlims.result_version (result_id, version_number, value, raw_code, raw_unit, loinc, ucum_value, status) VALUES (NEW.id, (SELECT COALESCE(MAX(rv.version_number), 0) + 1 FROM clinlims.result_version rv WHERE rv.result_id = NEW.id), NEW.value, NEW.raw_code, NEW.raw_unit, NEW.loinc, NEW.ucum_value, NEW.status); RETURN NULL; END; $BODY$ LANGUAGE plpgsql;
